query:
SELECT
  SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2) AS day_num,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_amount,
  COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
  AND SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2) >= '21'
  AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND paid_at != ''
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2)
ORDER BY day_num ASC;

SELECT
  SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2) AS day_num,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_amount,
  COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
  AND SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2) >= '21'
  AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND paid_at != ''
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2)
ORDER BY day_num ASC;
